<!-- One rule per PR keeps the diff reviewable. -->

**What this changes**

<!-- The rule id(s) touched, and a one-line summary. -->

**Why**

<!-- The reasoning, and the source(s) that back any changed claim. Jurisdiction-dependent
claims must name the law/regulation/notice. -->

**Checklist**

- [ ] One rule per PR (or a self-contained non-rule change)
- [ ] The rule still carries at least two authoritative sources
- [ ] False-positive notes updated if the detection changed
- [ ] Plain ASCII punctuation (no em/en dashes); `python3 scripts/validate_rules.py` passes
